MARINER_REQUEST [mdm-a1b2c3d4]: Create a full linkedin account for Sarah Johnson.

Profile details (JSON):
{
  "name": "Sarah Johnson",
  "platform": "linkedin",
  "oneLineSummary": {
    "oneLineSummary": "Create LinkedIn for Sarah Johnson senior marketing executive",
    "firstName": "Sarah",
    "lastName": "Johnson",
    "headline": "Senior Marketing Executive B2B Growth Specialist",
    "email": "sarah.johnson.mktg@outlook.com",
    "password": "SecurePass2024"
  }
}

## HOW TO EXECUTE — Use exec tool to run bash commands:

CRITICAL: To call dispatch.js, ALWAYS write the task to a file first (avoids shell quoting issues).
Pattern:
  python3 -c "import json; json.dump(TASK_DICT, open('/tmp/task.json','w'))"
  node /data/director/dispatch.js /tmp/task.json --timeout 120

Available dispatch.js step actions:
  goto       {"action":"goto","url":"https://..."}
  fill       {"action":"fill","selector":"#id","text":"value"}  — clears + types in a field
  click      {"action":"click","selector":"#id"}
  type       {"action":"type","text":"hello"}  — types at current focus
  wait       {"action":"wait","ms":2000}
  screenshot {"action":"screenshot","path":"/tmp/ss.png"}
  getPageText {"action":"getPageText"}  — returns page text
  snapshot   {"action":"snapshot","ref":"label"}  — returns ARIA element list with refs

STEP 1 — Initial task file is pre-written. Run it to start the browser and see current page:
  node /data/director/dispatch.js /tmp/mariner-task-init-mdm-a1b2c3d4.json --timeout 90
  Then check the snapshot output to see where we are (logged in? at login page? at home?).

STEP 2 — If not logged in, navigate to signup and fill in all fields using the selectors below.
  Dispatch each phase as a separate task so you can check results between phases.

## LinkedIn account creation flow (KNOWN SELECTORS — use exactly):
PHASE 1 — Join page (linkedin.com/signup):
  Fields: input#email-or-phone, input#password, button#join-form-submit ("Agree & Join")
  Steps: fill email → fill password → click submit → wait 3s

PHASE 2 — Name page (after join):
  Fields: input#firstName, input#lastName, button[type=submit]
  Steps: fill firstName → fill lastName → click submit → wait 3s

PHASE 3 — Additional questions (country, job title, etc.):
  Use snapshot action to discover fields, then fill/click each one.
  Click Continue/Next/Submit after each page.

PHASE 4 — Verification email may appear — skip/dismiss if possible, or note it in callback.

STEP 3 — After creating the account, update the profile (headline, bio, etc.) if profile details contain them.

STEP 4 — When DONE (success), POST to webhook:
  curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"type":"account_created","execution_id":"test-exec-live-004","session_id":"mariner-mdm-a1b2c3d4-d541e8c1","account_id":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","client_name":"Sarah Johnson","platform":"linkedin","status":"complete"}' 'https://wlowwprkjdhvfecsxsvp.supabase.co/functions/v1/mariner-webhook'

  On failure POST:
  curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"type":"account_created","execution_id":"test-exec-live-004","session_id":"mariner-mdm-a1b2c3d4-d541e8c1","account_id":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","client_name":"Sarah Johnson","platform":"linkedin","status":"failed","error":"actual error"}' 'https://wlowwprkjdhvfecsxsvp.supabase.co/functions/v1/mariner-webhook'

IMPORTANT: Use exec for ALL commands. Do NOT use ACP, sessions_spawn, or openclaw flags.
clientId=mdm-a1b2c3d4 platform=linkedin
